examples.text: High-stakes fights over shipwrecks pit archaeologists against treasure hunters in a vicious cycle of accusations
examples.explanation: 高风险的沉船争夺战将考古学家与寻宝者对立起来，陷入相互指责的恶性循环。

reviewSessions.example_text: High-stakes fights over shipwrecks pit archaeologists against treasure hunters in a vicious cycle of accusations
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案只覆盖“指控/控告”之意，未体现本句中“相互指责”的复数语境，理解偏弱。
matched_points: 涉及 accusation 的“指控/指责”核心含义
missing_points: 未体现参考释义“相互指责”
未体现例句中 accusations 表示多次/彼此的指责语境
“控告”更偏正式法律语境，与本句语义不完全贴合
